testsuite.name: com.example.study1.domain.board.service.BoardServiceTest

testcase.name: 사용자로부터 받은 요청 값을 바탕으로 게시물을 생성한다.

testsuite.system-out:
14:25:03.719 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.study1.domain.board.service.BoardServiceTest]: BoardServiceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:25:03.878 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.study1.Study1Application for test class com.example.study1.domain.board.service.BoardServiceTest
